messages.content: Who wrote the play 'Romeo and Juliet'?
What is the chemical symbol for gold?
In which year did World War II end?
What is the largest planet in our solar system?
Who wrote the philosophical work 'Thus Spoke Zarathustra'?
What is the half-life of carbon-14 used in radiocarbon dating?

What is the name of the closest known exoplanet to Earth?
Who composed the opera 'The Ring of the Nibelung'?
